TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Zambia kakinginan nu kanatal demiad kakinging nu kanatal demiad sa 24 bulad 10 demiad. tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal u tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal (congtung) ayza sa ci Edgar Lungu, micakat a demiad sa i 2015 a mihcaan 1 bulad 25 demiad. u tapang tusu nu kanatal sa u Lusaka . Zambia u Zambia sa i labu nu Fey-Cuo, itiza i 15 00 S, 30 00 E.u ahebal nu lala' mapulung sa 752,618 km2. u ahebal nu lala'ay sa 743,398 km2, u ahebal nu nanumay sa 9,220 sq km.hamin nu tademaw sa 15,510,711. kakalukan umah sa 31.70%, kilakilangan umah sa 66.30%, zumaay henay umah sa 2%. Sam-piya kunhe-kuo (Republic of Zambia ŚįöśĮĒšļěŚÖĪŚíĆŚúč), kitidaan i nuteban nu Africa , caay pililisay tu bayu a kanatal, ahebal nu lala' nuheni u Taywan nu tusa a bataan a bay , ulabu nu talakaw nu buyu makaala tu cacay (1000) a malebut a kunce nu pina a talakawan nu buyu'. tapang tusu nu kanatal sakasilaculan nu ba'tu, cen-ce nuheni matatungus, naw Africa nu sakatusa anikasi kalisiwan a kanatal, itini nu biyawan a Africa nu kanatal sasiidaay atu misakapahay tu niyadu'an a satalakaway anikaudip, amica kuni kasapakuyuc nina kanatal, nika u miduducay tu sakay micunusay a sakakapah nu sakaudip a kanatal ayda. likisi naayaw nu tusaay a malebut, Sam-piya itiniay a tademaw sawni maala ku balucu nui putahay a tademaw atu nika sasungaay. sabaw tu lima (15) a seci, musakamuay tu pan-tu a kamuwan nu tademaw milihidatu tu Sam-piya , namaka sabaw tu pitu (17) katukuh tu sabaw tu siwa (19) a seci u sayadahay numi cumuday. sabaw tu siwa 19 a se-ci nu cuoye, O-cuo mabulaway a tademaw atu dinduay a tademaw malingatu micumud tu niyadu'. cacay a malebut walu a lasubu wlau a bataan idawku walu (1888) a mihcaan, Ing-kuo (United Kingdom mabulaway ci Cecil John Rhodes namakayda i tumuk nuheni maala tu spikudkud tu 'kim a kilian. nuyda a mihcaan Ing-kuo (United Kingdom patideng tu Nan-luode-siya (Timulay a Rhodesia atu Pei-luode-siya (Amisay a Rhodesia . cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu tusa a bataan idaw ku sepat (1924) a mihcaan , Pei-luode-siya mala Ing-kuo nu mabulaway anikuwanan a dadiputan. cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu lima a bataan idaw ku tulu (1953) a mihcaan, Nan-luode-siya atu Niya-salan mapulung kuheni, misakaput tu Luode-siya atu Niya-salan lenpan . cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu enem a bataan idaw ku tusa (1962) a mihcaan pisingkiwan nu lenpan, Fa-cuo a tademaw mapadang nu katuuday a lipuingay a tademaw nu aenengan. kilul satu, mikaygi ku lipuin a tademaw mihang tunikagian , sakamusa tu Pei-luode-siya . pialesi han tu linpan han, miyukiw tu sakahebal nu cece'mincu cucun atu kunmincun . cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu enem a bataan idaw ku tulu (1963) a mihcaan, Cun-fa len-pan tatenga mibulesak. cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu enem a bataan idaw ku sepat (1964) a mihcaan cacay a bataan a bulat tusa a bataan idaw ku sepat a demiad, Pei-luode-siya miliyas tu Ing-kuo , sumad han ku ngangan tu Sam-piya-kunhe-kuo . .) mahka misiteked satu , mangelu' henay ku Sam-piya . tawya nu sepatay a biyawan nu kanatal- luode-siya , Nan-fea anikuwanan nu tu Sinan-fa ,atu Pu-tawya (Portugal mabulaway a kitidaan a Putaw-ya ( Portugal nu Tun-fea atu Pu-tawya (Portugal nu tipanay a African u sanglacay namin kumi kuwanay tunu henian. . Sam-piya (Zambia pacuked tu Fea-cuo (Africa nu timulan a pina nu kanatal a lumeni'ay a tademawan nu masakaputay, sisa nina kanatal atu Luode-siya (Rhodesia a kanki kabalihenawan sa, sadikuday nina tusaay a kanatalan caaytu kacumud. nikudan satu, nipadang patidenga nu China tu TAZARA dadan nu silamalay mawada'tu ku saka tahekal nu kawa . u Zambezi sauwac sauwac a Kaze-pa nanum nu dingki idaw kuni patudud tu tanengay a dingki. Sampi-ya (Zambia mikawaw tu mincu cence. paka icelang tu siakay a kawaw atu kasilaculan tu ba'tu ' nu sakasilaculan nu Sampu-ya (Zambia nu sasihica nu Fea-cuo a niyadu'ay nu kahemekan a nipalekalan. tusa a malebut idaw ku enem (2006) a mihcaan siwa a baulad tusa a bataan idaw ku walu a demiad, pisinkiwan nu Cung-tun atu i-huy a demiad. cacay a bataan a bulad tusa a demiad, sakakaay a fuing mihapu tu sasakamuen, ci Li-wil. Muwaw-nawaw-sa maala matulin cinida sa. nu katuuday a micudan makaalatu cacay a lasubu lima abataan nu tademaw dumasa idaw ku pitu a bataan nu a tademawan, nu aykuo a tademaw makaalatu tulu a bataan idaw ku enem a tademaw, nu tuni mincutan han idaw kuni kaalaan tu tusa a bataan idaw ku enem a tademawan. kakitidaan nina kakitidan lima ku tataydan, Ciatan-cia- talakway a buyubuyu'an , Tun-fei tabalikay a masatepaday , Kala-hali masabintangay a kakitidaan , Luan-kua-Mala-wey talakaway a buyu'buyu'an , masabitangay a kakitidaan nu Luan-kuwa sauwac . kacaledesan nanay a demiad nu Sampi-ya , talakaw ku buyu' masenged aca ku demiad, demiad nuheni mikibanihiuw tuduma a Fea-cuo nu kanatal, diheku ku demiad, mihcaan mala tulu ku puu' nuheni, capiwac han sabaw tu lima katukuh tu talu a bataan idaw ku tusa a du', tu mihcaan nulalud ku kasidikucan nuheni, kasienawan nuheni sa limaay a bulad katukuh tu walu a bulad, masasu hicaay kiya ku demiad nuheni, macunus nu talakaw nu buyu' nuheni, itinisa a puu'an tu labii amicunus tu saka dihku nu dikuc. . Sampi-ya ahebal ku lala adidi ku tademaw nuheni, pulung nu tademaw han nu mala tulu tu tusa nu Taywan , nika pankiw nu tademaw itida namin mueneng i tukay a kakitidaan, talakaw ku nikaudip nu tukayay a tademaw. u tun , ku sa kiman a ba'ba'tuwan a nikatatungusan nu lacul, idaw ku tun a ba'tuan kasi nganganan nu kanatal. . macunus nuni kasidamekan, matatungus ku nanum , kapah aca ku aaidangan nuheni, u kitakit han tulu ku satabakiay nu cascas u Widu-liya (Victoria cascas a cascas ku katinengan nu katuuday a tademaw, anganganan nu kakawawen u tademaw u ba'ba'tuan , sakaliwmah , mipadangay a kawaw , u laliwkuwan atu sapicunus tu kalisiw a kawaw ku amelikay. . saka si ngangay nu Widu-liya cascas , Sampi-ya idaw ku sabaw tu siwa a kanatal nu papahutinan tu aadupen nu kakitidaan, u Kafu-ay a kanatal nu kakitadaan ku satabakiay a lala, pakunida hananay ku saka situngus anikasi laculan, u dayhiw nu aadihan, dumasatu u saka namuhan nu aadupen nu aidangan idaw kunipi cunus tu tulu a bataan idaw ku tusa nu aadupan a kakitidaan. lalangawan namaka tusa a malebut a mihcaan malingatu palekal tu aaidangan, nutaydaay amiliwkuay a tademaw macunus macunus ku taydaay amidang. aydatu nikataydaan a mihcaan tuni palekalan tu aaidangan han idaw ku: Kafu-ay kanatalay a aaidangan , Sam-pi-si sauwac , Kali-pa-banaw . Sampi-ya (Zambia a tademaw idaw ku Fai-cuo a binacadan nu kalimulak nu wayway naheni, palaw nuheni u sakaudip atu sakakapah tu cabay nu sasalamaan a wayway, manamuh namin ku tademaw tu dadadiwen, matineng mudadiw matineng mapalaw. Sampi-ya (Zambia nu tukayan nipatideng tu kakaydaan a dadan ahebal, masilud bangcal kuni patideng tu luma, idaw kunama ka Ing-kuo mabulaway nu waywayan. inaka a kakitidaan u cenga kawala' ku luma, masa micidekay a silusian. tada u kakanen nu heni han u kupkup a walay, minfun, belac, atu canacanan nu lami' hecian.

…ôdgar r~…ĺuŇču, mi ¶akat a d…ômiad sa i **** a mińß ¶aan * bur~…ĺad ** d…ômiad. u tapaŇč tusu nu kanatar~…ĺ sa u r~…ĺusaka . zambia u zambia sa i r~…ĺabu nu f…ô- ¶uo, itiza i ** ** s, ** ** …ô.u ba Ē~ °tuan kasi ŇčaŇčanan nu kanatar~…ĺ. . ma ¶unus nuni kasidam…ôkan, matatuŇčus ku nanum , kapańß a ¶a ku aaidaŇčan nuńß…ôni, u kitakit ńßan tur~…ĺu ku satabakiaj nu ¶as ¶as u widu-r~…ĺija (*i ¶toria ¶as ¶as a ¶as ¶as ku katin…ôŇčan nu katuudaj a tad…ômaw, aŇčaŇčanan nu kakawaw…ôn u tad…ômaw u ba Ē~ °ba Ē~ °tuan , sakar~…ĺiwmańß , mipadaŇčaj a kawaw , u r~…ĺar~…ĺiwkuwan atu sapi ¶unus tu kar~…ĺisiw a kawaw ku am…ôr~…ĺikaj. . saka si ŇčaŇčaj nu widu-r~…ĺija ¶as ¶as , sampi-ja idaw ku sabaw tu siwa a kanatar~…ĺ nu papańßutinan tu aadup…ôn nu kakitidaan, u kafu-aj a kanatar~…ĺ nu kakitadaan ku satabakiaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺa, pakunida ńßananaj ku saka situŇčus anikasi r~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan, u dajńßiw nu aadińßan, dumasatu u saka namuńßan nu aadup…ôn nu aidaŇčan idaw kunipi ¶unus tu tur~…ĺu a bataan idaw ku tusa nu aadupan a kakitidaan. r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan namaka tusa a mar~…ĺ…ôbut a mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺiŇčatu par~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ tu aaidaŇčan, nutajdaaj amir~…ĺiwkuaj a tad…ômaw ma ¶unus ma ¶unus ku tajdaaj amidaŇč. ajdatu nikatajdaan a mińß ¶aan tuni par~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺan tu aaidaŇčan ńßan idaw ku: kafu-aj kanatar~…ĺaj a aaidaŇčan , sam-pi-si sauwa ¶ , kar~…ĺi-pa-banaw . sampi-ja (zambia a tad…ômaw idaw ku fai- ¶uo a bina ¶adan nu kar~…ĺimur~…ĺak nu wajwaj nańß…ôni, par~…ĺaw nuńß…ôni u sakaudip atu sakakapańß tu ¶abaj nu sasar~…ĺamaan a wajwaj, manamuńß namin ku tad…ômaw tu dadadiw…ôn, matin…ôŇč mudadiw matin…ôŇč mapar~…ĺaw. sampi-ja (zambia nu tukajan nipatid…ôŇč tu kakajdaan a dadan ańß…ôbar~…ĺ, masir~…ĺud baŇč ¶ar~…ĺ kuni patid…ôŇč tu r~…ĺuma, idaw kunama ka iŇč-kuo mabur~…ĺawaj nu wajwajan. inaka a kakitidaan u ¶…ôŇča kawar~…ĺa Ē~ ° ku r~…ĺuma, masa mi ¶id…ôkaj a sir~…ĺusian. tada u kakan…ôn nu ńß…ôni ńßan u kupkup a war~…ĺaj, minfun, b…ôr~…ĺa ¶, atu ¶ana ¶anan nu r~…ĺami Ē~ ° ńß…ô ¶ian.
S.FORM: Zambia kakinginan nu kanatal demiad kakinging nu kanatal demiad sa 24 bulad 10 demiad. tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal u tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal (congtung) ayza sa ci Edgar Lungu, micakat a demiad sa i 2015 a mihcaan 1 bulad 25 demiad. u tapang tusu nu kanatal sa u Lusaka . Zambia u Zambia sa i labu nu Fey-Cuo, itiza i 15 00 S, 30 00 E.u ahebal nu lala' mapulung sa 752,618 km2. u ahebal nu lala'ay sa 743,398 km2, u ahebal nu nanumay sa 9,220 sq km.hamin nu tademaw sa 15,510,711. kakalukan umah sa 31.70%, kilakilangan umah sa 66.30%, zumaay henay umah sa 2%. Sam-piya kunhe-kuo (Republic of Zambia ŚįöśĮĒšļěŚÖĪŚíĆŚúč), kitidaan i nuteban nu Africa , caay pililisay tu bayu a kanatal, ahebal nu lala' nuheni u Taywan nu tusa a bataan a bay , ulabu nu talakaw nu buyu makaala tu cacay (1000) a malebut a kunce nu pina a talakawan nu buyu'. tapang tusu nu kanatal sakasilaculan nu ba'tu, cen-ce nuheni matatungus, naw Africa nu sakatusa anikasi kalisiwan a kanatal, itini nu biyawan a Africa nu kanatal sasiidaay atu misakapahay tu niyadu'an a satalakaway anikaudip, amica kuni kasapakuyuc nina kanatal, nika u miduducay tu sakay micunusay a sakakapah nu sakaudip a kanatal ayda. likisi naayaw nu tusaay a malebut, Sam-piya itiniay a tademaw sawni maala ku balucu nui putahay a tademaw atu nika sasungaay. sabaw tu lima (15) a seci, musakamuay tu pan-tu a kamuwan nu tademaw milihidatu tu Sam-piya , namaka sabaw tu pitu (17) katukuh tu sabaw tu siwa (19) a seci u sayadahay numi cumuday. sabaw tu siwa 19 a se-ci nu cuoye, O-cuo mabulaway a tademaw atu dinduay a tademaw malingatu micumud tu niyadu'. cacay a malebut walu a lasubu wlau a bataan idawku walu (1888) a mihcaan, Ing-kuo (United Kingdom mabulaway ci Cecil John Rhodes namakayda i tumuk nuheni maala tu spikudkud tu 'kim a kilian. nuyda a mihcaan Ing-kuo (United Kingdom patideng tu Nan-luode-siya (Timulay a Rhodesia atu Pei-luode-siya (Amisay a Rhodesia . cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu tusa a bataan idaw ku sepat (1924) a mihcaan , Pei-luode-siya mala Ing-kuo nu mabulaway anikuwanan a dadiputan. cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu lima a bataan idaw ku tulu (1953) a mihcaan, Nan-luode-siya atu Niya-salan mapulung kuheni, misakaput tu Luode-siya atu Niya-salan lenpan . cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu enem a bataan idaw ku tusa (1962) a mihcaan pisingkiwan nu lenpan, Fa-cuo a tademaw mapadang nu katuuday a lipuingay a tademaw nu aenengan. kilul satu, mikaygi ku lipuin a tademaw mihang tunikagian , sakamusa tu Pei-luode-siya . pialesi han tu linpan han, miyukiw tu sakahebal nu cece'mincu cucun atu kunmincun . cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu enem a bataan idaw ku tulu (1963) a mihcaan, Cun-fa len-pan tatenga mibulesak. cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu enem a bataan idaw ku sepat (1964) a mihcaan cacay a bataan a bulat tusa a bataan idaw ku sepat a demiad, Pei-luode-siya miliyas tu Ing-kuo , sumad han ku ngangan tu Sam-piya-kunhe-kuo . .) mahka misiteked satu , mangelu' henay ku Sam-piya . tawya nu sepatay a biyawan nu kanatal- luode-siya , Nan-fea anikuwanan nu tu Sinan-fa ,atu Pu-tawya (Portugal mabulaway a kitidaan a Putaw-ya ( Portugal nu Tun-fea atu Pu-tawya (Portugal nu tipanay a African u sanglacay namin kumi kuwanay tunu henian. . Sam-piya (Zambia pacuked tu Fea-cuo (Africa nu timulan a pina nu kanatal a lumeni'ay a tademawan nu masakaputay, sisa nina kanatal atu Luode-siya (Rhodesia a kanki kabalihenawan sa, sadikuday nina tusaay a kanatalan caaytu kacumud. nikudan satu, nipadang patidenga nu China tu TAZARA dadan nu silamalay mawada'tu ku saka tahekal nu kawa . u Zambezi sauwac sauwac a Kaze-pa nanum nu dingki idaw kuni patudud tu tanengay a dingki. Sampi-ya (Zambia mikawaw tu mincu cence. paka icelang tu siakay a kawaw atu kasilaculan tu ba'tu ' nu sakasilaculan nu Sampu-ya (Zambia nu sasihica nu Fea-cuo a niyadu'ay nu kahemekan a nipalekalan. tusa a malebut idaw ku enem (2006) a mihcaan siwa a baulad tusa a bataan idaw ku walu a demiad, pisinkiwan nu Cung-tun atu i-huy a demiad. cacay a bataan a bulad tusa a demiad, sakakaay a fuing mihapu tu sasakamuen, ci Li-wil. Muwaw-nawaw-sa maala matulin cinida sa. nu katuuday a micudan makaalatu cacay a lasubu lima abataan nu tademaw dumasa idaw ku pitu a bataan nu a tademawan, nu aykuo a tademaw makaalatu tulu a bataan idaw ku enem a tademaw, nu tuni mincutan han idaw kuni kaalaan tu tusa a bataan idaw ku enem a tademawan. kakitidaan nina kakitidan lima ku tataydan, Ciatan-cia- talakway a buyubuyu'an , Tun-fei tabalikay a masatepaday , Kala-hali masabintangay a kakitidaan , Luan-kua-Mala-wey talakaway a buyu'buyu'an , masabitangay a kakitidaan nu Luan-kuwa sauwac . kacaledesan nanay a demiad nu Sampi-ya , talakaw ku buyu' masenged aca ku demiad, demiad nuheni mikibanihiuw tuduma a Fea-cuo nu kanatal, diheku ku demiad, mihcaan mala tulu ku puu' nuheni, capiwac han sabaw tu lima katukuh tu talu a bataan idaw ku tusa a du', tu mihcaan nulalud ku kasidikucan nuheni, kasienawan nuheni sa limaay a bulad katukuh tu walu a bulad, masasu hicaay kiya ku demiad nuheni, macunus nu talakaw nu buyu' nuheni, itinisa a puu'an tu labii amicunus tu saka dihku nu dikuc. . Sampi-ya ahebal ku lala adidi ku tademaw nuheni, pulung nu tademaw han nu mala tulu tu tusa nu Taywan , nika pankiw nu tademaw itida namin mueneng i tukay a kakitidaan, talakaw ku nikaudip nu tukayay a tademaw. u tun , ku sa kiman a ba'ba'tuwan a nikatatungusan nu lacul, idaw ku tun a ba'tuan kasi nganganan nu kanatal. . macunus nuni kasidamekan, matatungus ku nanum , kapah aca ku aaidangan nuheni, u kitakit han tulu ku satabakiay nu cascas u Widu-liya (Victoria cascas a cascas ku katinengan nu katuuday a tademaw, anganganan nu kakawawen u tademaw u ba'ba'tuan , sakaliwmah , mipadangay a kawaw , u laliwkuwan atu sapicunus tu kalisiw a kawaw ku amelikay. . saka si ngangay nu Widu-liya cascas , Sampi-ya idaw ku sabaw tu siwa a kanatal nu papahutinan tu aadupen nu kakitidaan, u Kafu-ay a kanatal nu kakitadaan ku satabakiay a lala, pakunida hananay ku saka situngus anikasi laculan, u dayhiw nu aadihan, dumasatu u saka namuhan nu aadupen nu aidangan idaw kunipi cunus tu tulu a bataan idaw ku tusa nu aadupan a kakitidaan. lalangawan namaka tusa a malebut a mihcaan malingatu palekal tu aaidangan, nutaydaay amiliwkuay a tademaw macunus macunus ku taydaay amidang. aydatu nikataydaan a mihcaan tuni palekalan tu aaidangan han idaw ku: Kafu-ay kanatalay a aaidangan , Sam-pi-si sauwac , Kali-pa-banaw . Sampi-ya (Zambia a tademaw idaw ku Fai-cuo a binacadan nu kalimulak nu wayway naheni, palaw nuheni u sakaudip atu sakakapah tu cabay nu sasalamaan a wayway, manamuh namin ku tademaw tu dadadiwen, matineng mudadiw matineng mapalaw. Sampi-ya (Zambia nu tukayan nipatideng tu kakaydaan a dadan ahebal, masilud bangcal kuni patideng tu luma, idaw kunama ka Ing-kuo mabulaway nu waywayan. inaka a kakitidaan u cenga kawala' ku luma, masa micidekay a silusian. tada u kakanen nu heni han u kupkup a walay, minfun, belac, atu canacanan nu lami' hecian.
